query:
=== Recent conversation (last 1 exchanges) ===
[tool: Agent(Implement fix for bug #426) → ]
[Assistant] Done. Back on `feature/col-031`. Now spawning the rust-dev in a worktree as intended.
[tool: Bash(git checkout feature/col-031 && git branch -d bugfix/426-freshness-half-life) → Switched to branch 'feature/col-031'
M	product/test/infra-001/suites/test_lifecycle.py
Your branch is ahead of 'origin/feature/col-031' by 11 commits.
  (use "git push" to publish your local commits)
Deleted branch bugfix/426-freshness-half-life (was 0569bc1).]
[User] [Request interrupted by user]
[tool: Bash(git checkout -b bugfix/426-freshness-half-life 2>&1) → Switched to a new branch 'bugfix/426-freshness-half-life']
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Sequential Module Migration Pattern: Re-Export Bridges for Large Crate Restructuring
Tag-Triggered Release Pipeline Pattern (Rust + npm via GitHub Actions)
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
Implementation checklist items from approved design must be enumerated in the rust-dev spawn prompt — not left implicit in the investigator report
Missing agent-0/agent-1 reports are the most common bugfix gate failure pattern
